programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Paul Burrell. Princess Diana's former butler, Paul Burrell, reports ghostly noises and activity in his home. Could someone be contacting him from beyond the grave? S3, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Tina Malone. Tina Malone longs to be freed from a skeletal figure that has haunted her since childhood. But he's not the only one that's been following her. S3, Ep2
Teleshopping.
A Chipping Norton barbershop hides an incredible antiques emporium. In an Anglesey salt factory, Drew and Tee discover an unusual bread and cheese cupboard. S17, Ep5
Drew's son Tom is keen to learn more about the trade. They visit Shepton Mallet Flea market in Somerset, where Tom spots a stunning painting. S17, Ep6
A motorbike-loving couple decide to move to the Isle of Man. They have a budget of £600,000 to spend on a stunning property with garage space for their bikes. S7, Ep11
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep14
Drew and Tee travel to four extraordinary locations across Northern Italy, including the country's most famed antique markets and a dreamy Tuscan villa. S17, Ep8
Drew and Tee go hunting for antiques in the homes of fellow dealers. Tucked away in the Cotswolds, Drew finds an ancient Greek masterpiece from 100BC. S17, Ep9
Drew encounters thrilling examples by three design titans who shaped the classic Georgian-and-Victorian look: Sir John Soane, Augustus Pugin and William Morris. S17, Ep10
Experts Philip Serrell and Anita Manning travel from Northumberland to Cumbria. What antique treasures will they buy along the way and then sell at the auction? S12, Ep14
Experts Philip Serrell and Anita Manning embark on the final leg of their road trip. Who will be able to turn the biggest profit at the last auction? S12, Ep15
Ceramics expert Kirsten is challenged with piecing together a broken clay sculpture. Plus, Will and Suzie work together to fix up a precious childhood toy. S6, Ep16
The Italian Job. Whilst sorting through an antique shop, Irita finds a Uranium glass vase. Then, she helps two brothers sell their late parent's antique collection. S1, Ep3/10
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a mother search for the first-born child she gave away. A woman seeks the sisters she never knew. S10, Ep5
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a woman fulfil her mother's final wish after her death. Plus, a 64-year-old woman searches for her birth mother. S12, Ep1
Yorkshire Mice And Russian Dolls. Cancer survivor, Claire wants to downsize to free up some cash and have fun. Plus, Clive needs funding for his mum's care home costs. S4, Ep19
From Russia With Love. A widow returns from Italy, bringing with her Soviet propaganda. While Victorian gadgets sees Angus geek-out over tech from a bygone age. S4, Ep20
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep5
Fix This Scullery Shuffle. The Marrs take on a renovation for a gardening enthusiast, creating both a modern main kitchen and a scullery for canning veggies from her garden. S7, Ep11
Funky Country House. A returning Laurel artist craves a small country house, and she throws Ben and Erin a challenge when she wants to take on some of the work herself. S9, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Paul Chuckle. Paul Chuckle feels his late brother Barry is close, but lurking in the dark is not a kindred spirit. The team find a sinister past to Paul's property. S3, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Jodie Kidd. Supermodel turned landlady, Jodie Kidd, has a malevolent spirit throwing wine bottles at her staff. How will they protect Jodie's 15th century pub? S3, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Chloe Ferry. Chloe Ferry considers selling her stunning five-bedroom mansion due to ongoing sinister activity. Could there be a link to the 'Geordie Ripper'? S3, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Drew and Tee travel to four extraordinary locations across Northern Italy, including the country's most famed antique markets and a dreamy Tuscan villa. S17, Ep8
Drew and Tee go hunting for antiques in the homes of fellow dealers. Tucked away in the Cotswolds, Drew finds an ancient Greek masterpiece from 100BC. S17, Ep9
A couple want to start an idyllic life in South Devon. They have a budget of £1.2 million to spend on property with a beautiful sea view and a separate annexe. S7, Ep12
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Drew explores an Aladdin's cave of magic carpets in Cumbria and royal biographer Lady Colin Campbell reveals antiques with tragic history from her romantic castle. S10, Ep6
Drew locks horns with a fellow dealer over a buffalo's skull in Oxfordshire. Plus, will a private girls' school in Hatfield get top marks for its haul of furniture? S10, Ep7
Artworks And Kinky Boots. Angus finds an old painting that could be worth a fortune and uncovers a pair of designer bondage boots that whip up a frenzy at auction. S6, Ep10
Angus helps Craig Revel Horwood auction off items from his glamorous house. Later, the team explore the home of legendary broadcaster John Sergeant. S1, Ep1
Jon Culshaw entertains Angus with hilarious impressions as they dig through clutter. Plus, actress Catherine Tyldesley auctions off her jewellery. S1, Ep2
A Hair-Raising Road Trip. Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott hit the road again, winding each other up, cracking bad jokes and looking for exquisite antiques in Wales. S27, Ep1
Small And Dainty. Raj and Irita look for antique goodies in Wales, but finding beautiful things that don't need two strong assistants to carry them isn't easy. S27, Ep2
A Precious Metal Extravaganza. It's all gold and silver on Raj's and Irita's third leg. They find their groove in Birmingham's reggae heartland before a surprise auction result. S27, Ep3
Secret Doors And Time Travel. Raj and Irita embark on a five-county tour of The Fens. On the way, they'll discover secret doors, prehistoric artefacts and time travel. S27, Ep4
Raj & Irita - Day 5. Raj and Irita head to the seaside in Lincolnshire. It's the last chance to hit the shops before their final auction showdown. S27, Ep5
Furniture restorer Katie Keat revamps a chest of drawers. Upholsterer Simion Hawtin-Smith works on a pair of chairs, and Sarah Moore repurposes a blanket. S7, Ep11
Robot maker Mark Haig is tasked with repurposing an old lawnmower. Jay Blades works on a cable drum, and Sarah Peterson revamps a wooden cabinet. S7, Ep12
Sarah Moore sees potential in a sunken armchair, a chest of drawers and a collection of file boxes. How will these unwanted items be transformed? S7, Ep13
From Portland To Paradise. A man from Portland was homeless when he inherited $1,400,000 from his mother. Now, he and his partner are moving to sunny Cape Coral, Florida. S12, Ep1
A Million-Dollar Hug. A mother and her two daughters won $1,000,000 on a scratch ticket. David helps them search for their dream home in Leechburg, Pennsylvania. S12, Ep2
The Ike Barinholtz's Project. Ike Barinholtz is giving back to someone he considers family. With a keen eye for design, he transforms her home into a warm family retreat. S6, Ep12
Michael Buble's Shocking Surprise! Michael Buble commemorates his grandfather by fulfilling his final wish: to provide his caretaker with a place to live. Drew and Jonathan help renovate it. S1, Ep6
